concerns.text: Task T013 describes implementing the FIR filter and amplitude correction (Plan: Filter Confound Control) but fails to explicitly tag or reference FR-002 (System MUST apply a low-pass FIR filter...)

Task T022 implements matched-filter SNR and mentions 'resolution-matched template banks' but lacks an explicit tag for FR-004 (System MUST compute the matched-filter SNR... using a template bank) or FR-008 (re-weighted SNR formula).

Task T031 implements Jonckheere-Terpstra and Welch's t-tests but does not explicitly tag FR-007 (System MUST perform unpaired Welch's t-tests... between adjacent resolution levels) or SC-005 (statistical significance measured by p-value of Welch's t-tests).
Task T032 implements detection probability curves and 'knee' points but lacks an explicit tag for SC-002 (Detection probability curves... measured against resolution... to identify the 'knee' point).

Task T033 aggregates resource metrics but does not explicitly tag FR-006 (System MUST profile and record wall-clock execution time and peak memory usage) or SC-003 (Computational resource savings measured against sensitivity loss).

Task T015 validates Nyquist limits but the description ('no frequency components exceed Nyquist limit by > 10dB of noise floor') is ambiguous compared to SC-004 ('exceeding the measured RMS noise floor of the specific segment'). The task should explicitly reference SC-004 to ensure the segment-specific baseline is implemented.

Task T014 description uses vague terms 'high, medium, and low frequencies' instead of the specific rates defined in the spec (4096, 2048, 1024, 512, 256 Hz). While the intent is clear, the description should be updated to match the spec's explicit list to prevent implementation ambiguity.
